headline: How The Phillips 66 (PSX) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Midstream Projects
summary: Phillips 66 is back in focus as an updated analyst fair value estimate shifts from US$180.95 to US$187.42 per share, putting fresh attention on where targets may sit relative to recent trading. Recent research has zeroed in on refining execution, Midstream growth plans, and margin trends, with some large banks outlining both upside drivers and reasons to stay cautious, even as certain targets, such as the US$207 level, are discussed. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative...
